query:
ALTER TABLE affiliates 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS badge VARCHAR(64),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS achievements TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paypalEmail VARCHAR(320),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS payoutThreshold INT DEFAULT 5000;
